content.verdict: In Baa Atoll UNESCO Biosphere Reserve, Amilla stands apart with mega-residences of 4 to 8 bedrooms alongside classic overwater pool villas — ideal for multi-generational honeymoons where parents or siblings join the celebration. Strong eco-credentials, an on-island organic garden, and a child-friendly layout round it out.
content.best_room: For classic honeymoon: the Ocean Reef House — overwater with private pool and direct reef access. For families or crew honeymoons: the Beach Residence (4 to 8 bedrooms) — gated compound, private pool, chef and butler included.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival & Seaplane Transfer
itinerary_7_nights.description: 30-minute seaplane from Malé. Buggy welcome, villa tour, sunset on the deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Organic Garden & Wellness
itinerary_7_nights.description: Tour Amilla's on-island organic garden, farm-to-table lunch, couples massage at Javvu Spa, dinner at Feeling Koi.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Hanifaru Bay Manta
itinerary_7_nights.description: Boat to UNESCO Hanifaru Bay (May–Nov) for the manta aggregation, return for a long afternoon at the pool, Italian dinner at Baazaar.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Reef & Sandbank
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning house-reef snorkel, private sandbank drop-off with picnic and Champagne, sunset dolphin cruise.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa & Romance
itinerary_7_nights.description: Full-day spa, private beach dinner under fairy lights with resident chef, fire dancers for the finale.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dive or Slow Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Two-tank dive or lazy reading in the overwater hammock. Dinner at Joe's Pizza Bar for something casual.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Floating breakfast, last reef swim, seaplane back to Malé.

caveats: Island is large — buggies are required to get around
Residences skew family-focused; overwater villas skew honeymoon
Price range is wide because residences are much pricier

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — particularly for couples traveling with family or wanting more space than a standard villa.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: May–November for mantas; December–April for classic dry-season weather.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No — one of the most family-friendly luxury islands in the Maldives.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Ocean Reef House for two-person honeymoons; Beach Residence for groups.
